uploadSubtitle: Drag and drop DICOM (.dcm), PNG or JPEG files here, copy and paste, or click to browse.
uploadDicomSuccess: DICOM file successfully converted to JPG format.
uploadErrorSize: File size is too large (Maximum limit: 15MB).
uploadErrorType: Unsupported file format. Please upload DICOM, PNG or JPEG.
stepPrepDesc: Image contrast is being optimized and resized to model dimensions (224x224)...
stepTier1Desc: Scanning for pneumothorax probability with MobileNetV3 and computing uncertainty...
stepTier2Desc: Escalation threshold crossed; routing to Tier 2 specialist model (EfficientNet / Ark+)...
stepTier2SkippedDesc: High confidence output; finalized prediction based on Tier 1.
stepGradcamDesc: Visualizing pneumothorax-suspected regions with pixel-level gradient attributions...
stepResultDesc: Combining all inference steps and conformal uncertainty sets to generate final report.
disclaimerContent: This software is an AI-powered clinical decision support tool. The generated predictions, uncertainty intervals, and Grad-CAM heatmaps do not constitute a diagnosis. All findings must be validated by a specialist radiologist or pulmonologist in light of clinical findings and patient history. Direct treatment decisions should never be made relying solely on this software in critical cases.
dashboardSub: Manage system escalation thresholds, monitor hardware resources, and inspect decision curve metrics.
loadedInfo: MobileNetV3, EfficientNet-B4, and Ark+ weights active on GPU/MPS.
thresholdDesc: Adjusts the escalation tolerance on the FastAPI backend. Raising the threshold shifts risk tolerance, automatically routing ambiguous cases to Tier 2 specialist models (EfficientNet / Ark+) or OOD classes.
thresholdSaveSuccess: Decision threshold successfully updated on the backend.
thresholdSaveError: An error occurred while updating the threshold on the backend.
dcaDesc: Shows the "Net Clinical Benefit" provided by the Tiered Classification architecture compared to treating all patients at Tier 2 or keeping all at Tier 1.
metricsDesc: Results of 1000-iteration DeLong bootstrap simulation for AUC-ROC and McNemar p-values on the selected test cohort.
noHistory: No recent diagnostic history records found.
deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to permanently delete this diagnostic record from the SQLite history database?
inferenceDesc: Real-time pneumothorax screening via cascading escalation architecture: MobileNetV2 (Tier 1) and Ark+/EfficientNetB4 (Tier 2).
originalImageArchivedDesc: This record was loaded from a past session. The original radiograph file is not stored in the database.
conformalDesc: The system guarantees with a 95% mathematical coverage probability that the patient's true diagnostic class lies within this prediction set.
flaggedBody: This case shows high model uncertainty. Manual radiologist review is strongly recommended before any clinical decision.
dicomUploadBody: Drop a DICOM study or click below. Backend converts to PNG and runs the same tiered pipeline.
ablationPageSubtitle: Quantitative ablations validating tiered routing, MC Dropout, TTA, and conformal prediction.
ablationNotGenerated: Ablation results have not been generated yet. Run scripts/build_ablation_json.py after training.
preliminaryBannerBody: Some rows have no genuine MLflow metrics yet — they are shown without numbers. After running real ablations, regenerate ablation.json via scripts/build_ablation_json.py.

pdfReport.title: CLINICAL DIAGNOSTIC & INFERENCE REPORT
pdfReport.subtitle: ThoraxAI Cascading Clinical Decision Support Output
pdfReport.conformalDesc: The system guarantees with a 95% mathematical coverage probability that the true diagnostic class lies within this prediction set.
pdfReport.disclaimerText: This software is an AI-powered clinical decision support tool. The generated predictions, uncertainty intervals, and Grad-CAM heatmaps do not constitute a diagnosis. All findings must be validated by a specialist radiologist or pulmonologist in light of clinical findings and patient history. Direct treatment decisions should never be made relying solely on this software in critical cases.
